QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_16

question.text: What is the minimum contribution per transaction for NPS Tier I?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The minimum contribution per transaction for NPS Tier I is Rs.500. The minimum annual contribution is Rs.1,000. **The Trap:** Rs.250 is the minimum subsequent contribution for Tier II, not Tier I. Rs.1,000 is the minimum annual requirement, not per transaction. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tier I: Rs.500/transaction, Rs.1,000/year. Tier II: Rs.1,000 opening, Rs.250 subsequent. These are commonly tested numbers. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Set up automatic SIPs via D-Remit for clients to avoid missing the Rs.1,000 annual minimum and prevent account freezing.
